title: Fix viewport fill on mobile and tablets
review_notes: All plan assumptions verified against codebase. File structure, current implementations, test IDs, and line references are accurate.

adjustments.note: Verified: scene.ts lines 22-23 match described setPixelRatio/setSize pattern. Proposed canvas style overrides are sound.

Avoid canvas 100% !important in CSS — Three.js setSize() sets inline styles that would conflict. Prefer the JS-based override after each setSize() call as described in the risk mitigation. Remove the CSS !important rule from the plan and rely solely on the JS approach in steps 1 and 2.
Verified: main.ts lines 57-60 match described two-phase reattachment. No changes needed to plan logic.
Test file also contains T-029-01 through T-029-07 for basic scene bootstrap. New tests should not break these.

risks_assessment: All three identified risks are valid. The CSS !important conflict risk (risk 1) is the most likely to manifest — recommend defaulting to the JS mitigation path rather than attempting CSS first.
